summary: Iteration 20 - Complete testing of new Onorari features: GlobalFeesManagement tabs (Per Cliente, Iguala Mensili), Export Excel with filters, FeeManagement with fee_type dropdown and conditional fields. All features working correctly.

issues: Console warning: Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent - accessibility improvement needed

passed_tests: ✅ Tab 'Onorari' in admin dashboard with 4 summary cards (Clienti con Onorari, In Attesa, Pagati, Iguala Mensili)
✅ Tab 'Per Cliente' - lista clienti con conteggio onorari cliccabile
✅ Toggle 'Per Categoria' / 'Lista Clienti' nella sezione Iguala
✅ Vista Per Categoria con 3 cards: Buste Paga, Contabilità Società, Domicilio Sociale
✅ Vista Lista Clienti con tabella (Cliente, Categoria, Buste Paga, Contabilità, Domicilio, Totale)
✅ Pulsante 'Esporta Excel' con dialog filtri (categoria cliente, tipo onorario)
✅ FeeManagement.jsx nella scheda singolo cliente - campo 'Tipo Onorario' con dropdown
✅ Dropdown Tipo Onorario con 7 opzioni: Standard, Consulenza, Pratica/Procedura, Dichiarazione Fiscale, Iguala Buste Paga, Iguala Contabilità, Iguala Domicilio
✅ Campo 'Data Scadenza' condizionale - visibile solo per Pratica/Procedura e Dichiarazione Fiscale
✅ Campo 'Mese di Riferimento' per tipi Iguala
✅ Creazione nuovo onorario Iguala con fee_type e recurring_month funzionante
✅ Existing Iguala fee displayed correctly with badge, month reference, and paid status
critical_code_review_comments: GlobalFeesManagement.jsx correctly implements all requested features with proper tabs and views
FeeManagement.jsx correctly implements conditional fields based on fee_type
Backend endpoints support all required filters and fee_type/recurring_month fields
Minor: DialogContent missing aria-describedby for accessibility
seed_data_creation: Using existing Iguala fee: 'Iguala Buste Paga Gennaio 2026' (€150,00) for client FRANCESCO JUNIOR DE LISO
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Onorari features are fully functional. GlobalFeesManagement has two tabs: 'Per Cliente' (client list with fee counts) and 'Iguala (Mensili)' (with Per Categoria/Lista Clienti toggle). Export Excel works with category and fee_type filters. FeeManagement in client detail shows conditional fields: 'Data Scadenza' for Pratica/Dichiarazione types, 'Mese di Riferimento' for Iguala types.

summary_cards.description: 4 cards: Clienti con Onorari (1), In Attesa (€250,00), Pagati (€150,00), Iguala Mensili (€150,00)

tab_per_cliente.description: Shows list of clients with fee counts, clickable to view details

tab_iguala_mensili.description: Header with total monthly €150,00, toggle between Per Categoria and Lista Clienti views

per_categoria_view.description: 3 category cards: Buste Paga, Contabilità Società, Domicilio Sociale with amounts

lista_clienti_view.description: Table with columns: Cliente, Categoria, Buste Paga, Contabilità, Domicilio, Totale

export_excel.description: Dialog with category and fee_type filters, downloads Excel file

fee_type_dropdown.description: 7 options: Standard, Consulenza, Pratica/Procedura, Dichiarazione Fiscale, Iguala Buste Paga, Iguala Contabilità, Iguala Domicilio

conditional_due_date.description: Data Scadenza field appears only for Pratica/Procedura and Dichiarazione Fiscale

conditional_recurring_month.description: Mese di Riferimento field appears only for Iguala types

api_endpoints_tested.GET /api/fees/all: WORKING - Returns list of fees with filters (status, client_type, search)
api_endpoints_tested.GET /api/fees/summary: WORKING - Returns total_pending, total_paid, total_overdue, total_count
api_endpoints_tested.GET /api/fees/by-client: WORKING - Returns clients with their fees grouped
api_endpoints_tested.GET /api/fees/export-excel: WORKING - Returns Excel file with optional category and fee_type filters
api_endpoints_tested.GET /api/clients/{id}/fees: WORKING - Returns fees for specific client
api_endpoints_tested.GET /api/clients/{id}/fees/summary: WORKING - Returns fee summary for specific client
api_endpoints_tested.POST /api/clients/{id}/fees: WORKING - Creates fee with fee_type, is_recurring, recurring_month, due_date
